# Celestial Showcase of God's Providence
## Scripture
"Praise the Lord, you his angels, you mighty ones who do his bidding, who obey his word. Praise the Lord, all his heavenly hosts, you his servants who do his will." - Psalm 103:20-21 and "And God said, 'Let there be lights in the vault of the sky to separate the day from the night, and let them serve as signs to mark sacred times, and days and years.'" - Genesis 1:14

## Reflection
As we gaze upon the celestial showcase of stars, planets, and galaxies, we are reminded of God's providence and sovereignty over all creation. The celestial bodies move in harmony, each playing its part in the grand symphony of the universe. Just as the planets orbit the sun in their designated paths, our lives are also guided by God's sovereign plan. The phases of the moon and the changing seasons remind us that our faith journey is also marked by different seasons, each with its unique challenges and opportunities for growth.

## Prayer
Dear Heavenly Father, we praise you for the celestial showcase of your creation, a testament to your power and wisdom. Help us to trust in your sovereignty over our lives, just as the planets trust in the gravity that holds them in orbit. May we navigate the changing seasons of our faith journey with confidence, knowing that you are always guiding us towards your eternal purpose. In Jesus' name, we pray. Amen.
